markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review January performance and align on content production.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance at All-Time High:** January traffic hit a new record, with the Knowledge Center achieving a 73% engagement rate. Dental sessions grew 77.5% WoW.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [**Closing the Competitor Gap:** Sunbit is now cited in 40%+ of key AI queries, closing the visibility gap with competitor CareCredit, especially for dental financing.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [**Publishing Backlog:** A 397-article backlog exists due to manual WordPress steps. GrowthX offered to help publish, pending Jason's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [**New Tool Access:** Sunbit has 90-day free Pro access to Check That, a new tool for tracking AI visibility and competitor performance.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Publishing

  - [**Production Status:** 29 articles in production; 10 sent daily via webhook.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [**Publishing Bottleneck:** A 397-article backlog exists due to manual WordPress setup steps.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** GrowthX offered to help publish to clear the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Publishing is a shared goal for both teams to drive results.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [**Decision:** Angel will discuss with Jason (returns Feb 16) to evaluate outsourcing or GrowthX support.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)

### January Performance & AI Visibility

  - [**Overall Traffic:** New all-time high in January.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [**Knowledge Center:** Record traffic (\~3,000 sessions) with a 73% engagement rate.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Segment Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [**Automotive:** Remains the top performer.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [**Dental:** Growing rapidly, with sessions up 77.5% WoW.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**AI Visibility (via Check That):**](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [**Query Visibility:** Sunbit is cited in 40%+ of key AI queries, a strong signal of brand presence.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
      - [**Competitor Gap:** Closing the visibility gap with CareCredit, particularly for dental financing queries.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** Increasing traffic from ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude (which is seeing explosive growth).](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
      - [**Top Article:** A Sunbit article is the 3rd most cited source for a key dental financing query.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Angel:**](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
      - [Publish pending articles after today's priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
      - [Discuss the publishing backlog and GrowthX's support offer with Jason (returns Feb 16).](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
      - [Review Check That access with Jason upon his return.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Provide featured images for new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Send the Check That query link to Angel.](https://fathom.video/share/gAfGGcUY5HZyyZkroSugkHXhPquWazrS?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
